brand_identity.name: Thrifty Curator
brand_identity.description: A high-end resale and consignment app with a boutique feel.
brand_identity.aesthetic: Pink/blush feminine theme with elegant styling, inspired by the 'Thrifty Curator' brand.

scale.button: text-sm md:text-base font-lato font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary-dark shadow-button transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-3 transform hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-charcoal border border-pink-100 hover:border-primary hover:text-primary transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-3
buttons.link_card: w-full bg-white/80 hover:bg-white border border-pink-50 hover:border-pink-200 shadow-card hover:shadow-hover transition-all duration-300 rounded-xl p-4 flex items-center justify-between group cursor-pointer

forms.input: w-full bg-white border border-pink-100 focus:border-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-gray-400 text-charcoal-700
forms.label: block text-sm font-medium text-charcoal-600 mb-2 font-lato

cards.dashboard: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-card p-6 border border-pink-50

landing_page.structure: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen p-6 flex flex-col items-center gap-8 relative overflow-hidden
landing_page.hero: flex flex-col items-center text-center gap-4 z-10

dashboard.sidebar: w-full md:w-64 bg-white border-r border-pink-50 p-6 flex flex-col gap-2

background_texture.description: Soft pink silk texture for subtle backgrounds

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-charcoal-700 on pink-50 meets 4.5:1 ratio. Use darker pink for small text.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus ring with color-primary/50 offset-2
accessibility.aria: All form inputs must have associated labels. Icons must have aria-hidden=true if decorative.

setup: Install dependencies: `npm install react-icons framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge`
Configure Tailwind with the custom pink palette defined in 'colors'.
Add Playfair Display and Lato fonts via Google Fonts in index.html or CSS.

implementation_strategy.landing_page: Create a 'Linktree' style mobile-first page. Use the logo at the top. List the selling platforms as elegant cards with icons on the left and platform name on the right. Add a 'Share' button that triggers the native share API.
implementation_strategy.forms: Use a clean, single-column layout for forms. Input fields should be large and touch-friendly (min-height 48px). Validate inputs before submission.
implementation_strategy.employee_dashboard: Create a simple card-based interface. Large 'Clock In' (Green/Teal) and 'Clock Out' (Red/Pink) buttons. Display current status clearly. Show a list of recent shifts.
implementation_strategy.admin_dashboard: Table view of all employee hours. Filter by date range. Use Shadcn Table component customized with pink headers.

universal_rules: DO NOT use generic blue for links/buttons. Use the defined Primary Pink or Charcoal.
Ensure the logo is prominent on the landing page.
Use the 'Glass' texture for cards on the landing page over the background texture.
All interactive elements must have `data-testid` attributes.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
